##NAMES=Lefontite
##RRUFFID=R140428
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe_2_Al_2_Be(PO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_
##LOCALITY=João Teodoro mine, Linópolis district, Divino das Laranjeiras, Minas Gerais, Brazil
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Brown prismatic crystals, associated with light-brown greifensteinite (R060588), dark green acicular gormanite (R080075), and white fine-grained leucophosphite. Type sample.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140428
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe_1.51_Mn_0.39_Mg_0.06_Ca_0.03_)Al_1.99_(Be_1.02_Li_0.08_)(P_0.99_O_4_)_2_(OH)_6_ ; The BeO and Li2O were determined by ICP-MS.
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.0087 b: 10.5082 c: 13.1179 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 966.1 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
